Verified Petition For Court Determination Of Entitlement On Will With Interlineation Before Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jul-24-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Trevor Rose appeared by zoom for petitioner.

The court stated that the petition was left on for hearing in case anyone appeared to object and noted that no one is objecting. The Verified Petition for Court Determination of Entitlement of Will with Interlineation Before Final Distribution is under submission with the court's intent to grant.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Choi. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Mar-27-2023 Continued To May-22-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Verified Petition For Court Determination Of Entitlement On Will With Interlineation Before Final Distribution
Off Calendar Mar-13-2023 Continued To May-01-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Mar-16-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Trevor Rose, via ZOOM, for Adrian Brozell, Petitioner.

The court confirms that counsel recently submitted a Notice of Petition for efiling. The court reviews the Notice submitted for filing and believes that appropriate notice has been provided and that it intends to grant this petition. The court confirms that no one is appearing to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated Jun-23-2015 is admitted to probate. Adrian Michael Brozell is appointed Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Shirley Yawitz is appointed probate referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for Mar-27-2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

The court advises counsel that since there is a handwritten interlineation in the will, the personal representative will have to file a petition under Probate Code Section 11700 to determine entitlement to the artwork before the estate can close and the estate assets distributed.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: G. Bastain. Not reported.
